purpose: Internal partnership proposal for Madison Theater ownership discussions. Not for public route publishing.

executiveSummary.headline: Build Madison Theater into the flagship home for premium Latin cultural programming in the Cincinnati/Covington market.
executiveSummary.oneSentenceValue: QueenCity Soundboard operates end-to-end programming, marketing, and ticketing workflows to increase event quality, consistency, and venue revenue.
executiveSummary.primaryAsk: Schedule a 30-minute alignment meeting to review pilot calendar, economics, and operating model.

talkingPoints: Cincinnati/Covington audience demand for consistent Latin cultural programming is under-served.
Madison Theater has the capacity, location, and brand recognition to become the default home for this category.
Programming consistency creates compounding audience trust and repeat attendance.

proposalStructure.objective: Define role clarity and operating responsibilities.
talkingPoints: Venue partner: house operations, technical baseline, and facility readiness.
QCS partner: artist pipeline, curation, campaign execution, and event production direction.
Shared planning cadence with a rolling calendar and monthly performance reviews.
Program mix: anchor headliners, curated mid-tier nights, and community growth events.
Season design: 8-12 week cycle with event spacing to preserve demand quality.
Audience path: discovery to ticket purchase to repeat attendance and referrals.
Ticket revenue participation and transparent settlement process.
Incremental upside from sponsorship packages and branded activations.
Merch and premium experience add-ons as secondary revenue streams.

proposalStructure.objective: Reduce risk and accelerate decision speed.
talkingPoints: Pilot period: first 60-90 days with agreed event count and KPIs.
Weekly operating sync and post-event review loop.
Decision gate at pilot close for scale-up commitment.

kpis.name: Repeat attendance
kpis.target: Track return behavior by campaign cohort

kpis.name: Revenue per event
kpis.target: Improve through programming quality and upsell

kpis.name: Marketing efficiency
kpis.target: Lower cost per ticket sold over pilot cycle

risksAndMitigations.mitigation: Use rolling 8-12 week calendar with locked campaign windows.
Segment campaign messaging by event type and audience intent.
Standardized show-run checklist and post-mortem protocol.

meetingAgenda30Min: 5 min - Strategic objective and venue vision
10 min - Commercial model and pilot KPIs
5 min - Next steps and decision timeline
nextSteps: Confirm stakeholder attendees for alignment meeting.
Share preferred pilot window and blackout dates.
Finalize pilot event mix and draft commercial terms.
Set kickoff date and reporting cadence.
notes: This file is intentionally not connected to any public Next.js route.
Public-facing content remains on /madison-theater and should continue reflecting active site content.
